title: Add Apache-2.0 license and publication notices
description: Set ArchMap's public license to Apache-2.0 and added third-party dependency/icon/trademark notices for publication readiness.
decision_notes: The human selected Apache-2.0 for public release.
The package previously had no license metadata or root LICENSE file, which would be a public-release blocker.
Third-party notices explicitly distinguish core no-icon behavior, optional icon packs, CC0 simple-icons paths, and trademark ownership.
verification: npm pack --dry-run: LICENSE and THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md included in tarball
